title: Patellaria procumbens

uses: Patellaria procumbens is a plant species traditionally used in folk medicine. Its medicinal uses include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Traditionally, it is used as a tea or tincture to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being. Further research is needed to fully understand the plant's medicinal properties and potential uses.
